MINUTES FOR FEB-09-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 502

COURT TRIAL WAS ASSIGNED TO DEPT 502 ON FEB-09-2004 - COURT ORDERED THAT TRIAL WILL PROCEED BY DECLARATION AND BY COURT CALL AND THAT DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WITH EXHIBITS ATTACHED SHALL BE FILED BY, SERVED, AND WITH A COURTESTY COPY TO THE COURT BY MARCH 30, 2004 CROSS-EXAMINATION REGARDING DECLARATIONS WILL BE ON WEDNESDAY, APRIL 7, 2004, AT 9:30AM BY EITHER COURT CALL OR IN PERSON. COURT WILL ISSUE WRITTEN ORDER. CONTINUED TO APR-07-2004 AT 9:30 AM IN 502 (502 JUDGE C. MITCHELL; CLERK: LINDA ESPY; REPORTER: DEBORAH NEVILLE)

COURT TRIAL RESUMED - DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR - THE COURT HAVING READ AND CONSIDERED THE DECLARATION OF MS. MAAKESTAD, THE COURT FOUND JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF, JAN F. MAAKESTAD, AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT, J. DAVID ENRIGHT, IV, FOR $50,000 (PRINCIPAL) PLUS INTEREST OF 7% PER ANNUM FROM 1/22/02 UNTIL 4/7/04 PLUS REASONABLE COSTS OF SUIT. THE COURT DENIED ATTORNEY FEES. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE JUDGMENT (502 JUDGE C. MITCHELL; CLERK: LINDA ESPY; REPORTER: DEBORAH NEVILLE)
MEMORANDUM RE: COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAAKESTAD, JAN F
